column1: Figures relate only to those industries covered in the Quarterly Survey of Employment and Vacancies and the Quarterly Employment Survey of Construction Sites. Starting from the statistical month of September 2025, the Chinese description of "persons engaged" has been changed. Please refer to the "Concepts and Methods" for details.

The above statistics are compiled based on the Hong Kong Standard Industrial Classification (HSIC) Version 2.0. Users may also download past statistics based on HSIC Version 1.1 for reference. For more details on the revision of HSIC, please refer to the feature article entitled "Revision of the Hong Kong Standard Industrial Classification" published in the November 2008 issue of the Hong Kong Monthly Digest of Statistics.
1 Vacancy rate is the ratio of number of vacancies to number of job opportunities (i.e. the sum of number of persons engaged and number of vacancies), expressed in the form of percentage.
[*1] Figure is not released in order to safeguard confidentiality of information of individual establishments.
